query:
-- Add new columns to campaigns table
ALTER TABLE campaigns 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS type ENUM('digital', 'field', 'awareness', 'mixed') DEFAULT 'digital' NOT NULL AFTER description,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status ENUM('draft', 'active', 'paused', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL AFTER type,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plannedBudget INT AFTER status,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS actualBudget INT AFTER plannedBudget,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'YER' AFTER actualBudget,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS platforms TEXT AFTER endDate,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS goals TEXT AFTER platforms,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS targetLeads INT AFTER goals,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS targetBookings INT AFTER targetLeads,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS targetROI INT AFTER targetBookings,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS teamLeaderId INT AFTER targetROI,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS teamMembers TEXT AFTER teamLeaderId;

ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS status ENUM('draft', 'active', 'paused', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL AFTER type,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS plannedBudget INT AFTER status,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS actualBudget INT AFTER plannedBudget,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'YER' AFTER actualBudget,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS platforms TEXT AFTER endDate,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS goals TEXT AFTER platforms,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS targetLeads INT AFTER goals,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS targetBookings INT AFTER targetLeads,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS targetROI INT AFTER targetBookings,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS teamLeaderId INT AFTER targetROI,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS teamMembers TEXT AFTER teamLeaderId;
